title: Vanilla Upgrade
description: Vanilla styled Modpack that adds content.
body:
![Vanilla Upgrade Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/181ceedef9f39ce514222e85ca22df5abe42c729.png)
## Vanilla Upgrade Features:
- Over 1,500 New Blocks
- Over 160 New Bioms
- Improved World Generation
- Overhauled End
- Overhauled Nether
- Over 40 New Structures
- Two New Dimensions
- Over 150 New Mobs
- New Mob Variants
- New Armor Sets and Weapons
- New Fishing Mechanics
- Various Utility Mods
